chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-462 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders of office objection at flag.A. For Katcha Peshi. 16.06.2017. Mr. Muhammad Ashique Dhamrah Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Akbar Ali Kalhoro State Counsel. ---------------- Mr. Zahid Hussain Chandio, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents which is taken on record. He makes categorically statement that neither they have caused harassment to the petitioner nor they will cause harassment in future. In view of such statement learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, the same stand disposed of. J U D G E S Ashfaq
